name: llm_scorer_evidence_files
description: Demonstrates `llm_scorer_evidence_files`, which attaches rubric or ground-truth files to the LLM judge prompt without copying them into the agent's worktree. The companion `llm_scorer_evidence_files.md` is read into the prompt as `<evidence_file path="...">…</evidence_file>` at priority 3 (above the agent's own output) so the judge has the rubric even under tight prompt budgets. Use this when `llm_scorer_instruction` (capped at 10 000 chars) is too small for the rubric or when the agent must not see the expected answer.
llm_scorer_instruction: Grade the reply against the rubric attached as evidence (`llm_scorer_evidence_files.md`). The agent does not see this rubric; only the judge does.

turns.message: What is the capital of France? Reply with just the city name on its own line.
